design_philosophy: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4). Authority, clarity, and function-first. The interface is purely functional, relying on sharp typographic hierarchy, rigid grid structures, and absolute minimalism. Color is reserved exclusively for data signals (buy/sell, crossovers) and primary actions. It uses a 'Control Room' dense grid approach to maximize data visibility without overwhelming the user.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid. Dense, organized, high utility.

buttons.primary: bg-brand_primary text-white hover:bg-brand_primary_hover rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-surface border border-border text-text_primary hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-signal_sell text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

cards.header: border-b border-border px-4 py-3 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50/50

badges.base: px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm border

inputs.style: border border-border bg-surface rounded-sm px-3 py-2 text-sm text-text_primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand_primary focus:border-brand_primary

toggles.style: Shadcn Switch customized to use brand_primary when active, square edges (rounded-sm) instead of full pill shape if possible.

layout.header: Sticky top bar with Logo, Global Settings Icon, and Notification config.
layout.top_panel: Status Bar (col-span-full): Shows 'Last Daily Scan', 'Next Run', and 'Manual Trigger' button. Minimalist, text-heavy row.
layout.main_grid: Bento Grid (col-span-full): List of tickers. Each ticker is a horizontal card or grid row containing: Ticker Name, Current Price, Mini Sparkline (Recharts), RSI Value + Badge, MA Short/Long Values + Cross Badge, and a 'Settings' gear per ticker.
layout.sidebar_or_bottom: Alert History Log (col-span-full lg:col-span-4): A feed of recent triggered alerts.

features.description: Dashboard listing tracked stock tickers. Default includes 'VT' (ETF Vanguard Total World). Displays price, RSI, MA values, and signal badges.
features.visual_rules: Use font-mono for all numeric data. Badges should be prominent but small (text-[10px]).
Simple input field in a header or distinct 'Add Asset' card. Deletion via a small trash icon on hover.

features.description: Global and Per-Ticker settings for RSI (period, lower, upper) and MA (short, long).
features.visual_rules: Use Shadcn Sheet or Dialog. Clean label-input pairs. Default RSI: 14, Low: 30, High: 70. Default MA: 50, 200.

features.description: Toggle alerts per condition: RSI low, RSI high, golden cross, death cross.
features.visual_rules: Minimalist switches next to condition labels in the settings panel.

features.description: Email recipient setup and Browser Push opt-in.
features.visual_rules: Dedicated section in Global Settings. Input for email, button to 'Enable Push'.
Vertical list, timestamp in mono, event text, and colored dot indicator based on signal type.

features.description: Daily scan status indicator and manual trigger button.
features.visual_rules: Top bar element. Text: 'Last scan: 14:00 (Success)'. Button: 'Run Scan Now'.
Use Recharts. Sparkline style: no axes, no grid, single line. Line color: brand_primary or green/red depending on 24h performance.

motion.hover: Fast and snappy. 150ms ease-out on buttons and cards (background shifts).

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize a dense, information-rich layout using the Control Room grid strategy.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Install and use 'IBM Plex Sans' for text and 'IBM Plex Mono' for numbers.
Keep borders sharp (rounded-sm) and avoid heavy shadows. Use 1px solid borders.
Implement Recharts for the mini sparkline charts on each ticker card.
Use Shadcn UI for Dialogs/Sheets, Inputs, Switches, and Badges. Override the default Shadcn radius to 'sm'.
Build the dashboard using pure Tailwind CSS for layout.
Ensure the default ticker 'VT' is pre-loaded.
For the daily scan, implement a mock or simple manual trigger mechanism for the MVP if a cron job isn't feasible immediately, but the UI must show the last run and next run.
